narrative:
Little Hocking (precinct in Washington County) has 1,357 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.7 percentage points.
